subject: You're invited: SchoolAI Open at UCET
previewText: Space is limited. RSVP now to join us March 16th at Bad Caddy.
module-4-0-0:
Hey [First Name],

UCET is just around the corner, and we want to celebrate with you.

If you're heading to the conference, come join us the evening of Day 1 for the SchoolAI Open event. It's a chance to connect with other Utah educators and celebrate the incredible work happening in schools across the state.

Event details:

  • Date: Monday, March 16, 2026
  • Time: 5:00 – 8:00 PM
  • Location: Bad Caddy | 451 S 300 W, Salt Lake City (about a 10-minute walk from Salt Palace)

Food, drinks, and activities provided. Come as you are.

Space is limited, so if you're planning to come, grab your spot now.

Hope to see you there. You can also find us at booth 310 during the conference.

— The SchoolAI team

P.S. Not registered for UCET yet? It's not too late. [Register here →]
